content: Self-Refine's iterative no-training feedback loop can be reframed as a base structure to unify fragmented LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning single-perspective reflection checks into a cascading multi-perspective refinement workflow. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data, while addressing the limitation of single-perspective self-feedback blindness that existing LLM self-reflection mechanisms seek to solve.
